name: hESC-derived RPE advanced dry AMD and Stargardt phase 1/2 studies
summary: Two prospective open-label phase 1/2 studies of subretinal hESC-derived retinal pigment epithelium transplantation in atrophic age-related macular degeneration and Stargardt macular dystrophy.
population: Nine patients with atrophic age-related macular degeneration and nine patients with Stargardt macular dystrophy
